what: Use bf16 Q with fp8 KV (a16w8 kernel) to skip Q quantization overhead
why: Q quantization (per_tensor_quant_hip) costs ~5-10us per call. The a16w8 MLA kernel accepts bf16 Q directly with fp8 KV. This saves quant cost while keeping fp8 KV bandwidth savings.

what: Direct ASM kernel calls with fully pre-allocated buffers for non-persistent fp8 path, bypassing mla_decode_fwd Python overhead
why: mla_decode_fwd allocates logits, attn_lse, final_lse tensors on EVERY call. For splits==1+fp8, logits IS the output (no reduce). Bypassing mla_decode_fwd and calling mla_decode_stage1_asm_fwd directly with pre-allocated buffers eliminates per-call allocations (~5-10us). Also skips per_tensor_quant_hip import try/except overhead.
